role: Provides a pluggable credential storage system with platform-specific backends and scoped store factories for secure secret persistence.
responsibility: Combines platform-aware backends (macOS Keychain, Linux secret-tool, Windows DPAPI, in-memory) with high-level store factories to securely manage LLM API keys and other credentials, handling validation, platform selection, and deterministic naming.

children.role: Infrastructure facade providing platform-specific credential storage backends for secure secret persistence across macOS, Linux, and Windows, with an in-memory fallback.
Infrastructure module providing pluggable, secure credential storage for LLM API keys, with deterministic factory functions for project-scoped and global stores.
